title: phlomis × composita subsp. trullenquei
intro: Phlomis × composita subsp. trullenquei is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the family Lamiaceae and is native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit antibacterial and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Phlomis × composita subsp. trullenquei include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In terms of herbal preparations, the leaves of this plant are often used to make teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be used to support various health conditions.
